动力Power

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是标注为'动力 Power'的针脚表，列出'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'，并给出2-U-黄 YELLOW、3-V-红 RED、4-W-黑 BLACK、6-PE-黄绿 YELLOW/GREEN等动力相线和保护地的引脚、功能、线色对应关系。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是标注为'反馈 Feedback'的针脚定义表，列出'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'，包含1脚'VCC +5V'、2脚'GND'、13脚'SHIELDING'、16脚'SD+'、17脚'SD-'及对应线色，属于反馈编码器连接器的引脚和信号分配。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内为标注'6 PIN'与'HF02106ZJ'的6针连接器针位图，孔位旁有1至6编号；结合完整图中同一动力Power区域的相邻表格，针脚对应NC、U、V、W、PE及线色，因此属于动力连接器针脚定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read the pin label and adjacent circular contact as '10'; corrected to visible pin number 1.
OCR read the pin label and adjacent circular contact as '20'; corrected to visible pin number 2.
OCR read the pin label and adjacent circular contact as 'O'; corrected to visible pin number 3.

OCR read the pin label and adjacent circular contact as '6O'; corrected to visible pin number 6.

terminology_notes: The crop is a connector pin-number layout rather than a dimensional view.

dimension_records.reason: Visible numeric label in the circular connector pin layout; OCR box includes adjacent contact geometry, so only the pin number is retained.
Visible numeric label in the circular connector pin layout; OCR text was corrected from a merged reading with nearby contact geometry.
Visible numeric label near the upper contact; OCR captured the adjacent circular contact rather than the digit, so the engineering pin label is retained.
Clear standalone numeric label in the connector pin layout.
Visible numeric label beside the lower-right contact; OCR merged the label with the circular contact and was corrected.
Visible numeric label beside the center contact; OCR merged the label with the contact circle and was corrected.

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Circular connector pin layout with visible pin numbers 1 through 6 retained from OCR-backed sources.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Connector model text and '6 PIN' label are not included because no reliable OCR source_id is available in the target crop.

unresolved_items.reason: Low-confidence OCR from connector outline or geometry, not reliable text.
Low-confidence OCR from connector outline or geometry, not reliable text.
Likely false OCR from arcs or outline geometry, not visible engineering text.
Likely circular contact geometry, not a standalone text annotation.
Likely circular contact geometry, not a standalone text annotation.
Large region overlaps connector body and arcs; likely false OCR from geometry.
Low-confidence OCR over connector outline and contacts, not reliable text.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框显示圆形17针接口针位图，含针脚编号1至17及可见文字'17 PIN'、'HF01817ZJ'；在完整标注图中该目标位于反馈接口区域，与左侧反馈针脚定义表对应，因此属于编码器反馈连接器针位信息。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected OCR '(13' to '13' based on visible pin label.

terminology_notes: Numeric labels inside the circular connector are treated as connector pin identifiers, not dimensional values.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Visible connector face pin labels detected by OCR: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17. Pin count text is Not specified in OCR for this crop.
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: OCR检测到的连接器端面针脚编号：1、2、3、4、5、6、8、9、10、12、13、14、15、16、17。本裁剪区域OCR未提供针数文字。
dimension_records.reason: 这些文字均位于圆形连接器端面内部，属于针脚编号而非机械尺寸；删除了由轮廓线或重复重叠识别产生的噪声。

frontend_table_records.specification: Visible connector face pin labels detected by OCR: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17. Pin count text is Not specified in OCR for this crop.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: OCR检测到的连接器端面针脚编号：1、2、3、4、5、6、8、9、10、12、13、14、15、16、17。本裁剪区域OCR未提供针数文字。

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Not specified in this OCR crop.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not applicable to this connector face crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Not specified in this OCR crop.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector face view shows detected pin identifiers 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, and 17. Some visible labels are not usable without OCR source IDs.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: OCR did not provide usable source IDs for all visually apparent pin labels; connector model text and pin-count text are not available from OCR in the target crop.

unresolved_items.issue: Some visually apparent connector pin labels are not represented by reliable OCR source IDs in the target crop and therefore were not added as text annotations.
Discarded OCR sources ocr_001, ocr_002, ocr_010, ocr_013, ocr_016, and ocr_019 as likely noise, structure-line recognition, or overlapping incorrect readings.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内是电机侧视外形和轴端键槽尺寸图，包含'KEY'、'40'、'6'、'Ø110'、'Ø22'、'55±1'、'171±1.5'等长度、直径、公差和参考尺寸，并有引出线标注部件位置；未出现针脚功能或接线定义。

OCR read as 24.5-0.2; restored upper deviation 0 from visible tolerance layout.

OCR read as 0110-0.035; corrected leading 0/O to diameter symbol and restored upper deviation 0.

dimension_records.reason: Located on the key detail view with dimension arrows spanning the key length.
Vertical dimension on the key detail view indicates the key width/height.
Dimension on the key cross-section detail specifies the 6 mm key section.
Text label KEY identifies the separate key detail.
Leader arrow points to a component and is a part/index callout rather than a dimension.
Leader arrow points to a component and is a part/index callout rather than a dimension.
Leader label KEY points to the key/keyway feature on the shaft.
Vertical dimension adjacent to the shaft shoulder shows a unilateral tolerance.
Horizontal arrows across the keyway indicate a 5 mm keyway width.

Callout explicitly includes ref, so it is recorded as a reference dimension.
Callout explicitly includes ref, so it is recorded as a reference dimension.
Bottom dimension spans the motor body length from flange face to rear end.
Bottom dimension spans the shaft extension length from shaft end reference to flange face.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Mounting pilot diameter is Φ110 with 0/-0.035 tolerance.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft diameter is Φ22 with 0/-0.013 tolerance; shaft extension is 55±1; key detail includes 40 length, 6 by 6 section, and shaft keyway width 5.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Motor body axial length is 171±1.5; 5.5(ref) and 13.5(ref) are reference axial/clearance dimensions.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector is visible in the drawing but no connector dimensional text is present in the OCR source boxes for this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No additional dimensions should be inferred beyond the OCR-backed annotations.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域为电机前端结构视图，显示法兰圆形轮廓、安装孔、中心线、角度与尺寸标注，如'Ø145±0.2'、'4-Ø9'、'45°'、'130'，并用引线标出'6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR'和'17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR'的物理安装位置；未给出针脚功能或线色定义，因此归入机械尺寸。

text_annotations.correction_note: Added spaces for readability; overlapping partial OCR sources ocr_002 and ocr_003 omitted as duplicates.
Added spaces for readability; overlapping partial OCR sources ocr_004, ocr_006 and ocr_007 omitted as duplicates.
Corrected leading OCR '0' to diameter symbol Φ.
Corrected OCR '09' to diameter callout Φ9.
Added missing degree symbol based on visible angular dimension marking.
Merged square symbol OCR with numeric OCR; duplicate broader OCR source ocr_014 omitted.

terminology_notes: □ denotes square feature or square outside dimension.
translation_notes: Connector labels are preserved in English and normalized with spacing.

dimension_records.reason: Leader line points to the right circular connector, identifying the encoder connector type.
Leader line points to the left circular connector, identifying the motor connector type.
Diameter callout with leader points to the dashed pitch circle through the mounting holes.
Callout format 4-Φ9 indicates four identical mounting holes of diameter 9.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Mounting holes located at 45 degrees from centerline on both sides

dimension_records.reason: Two angular dimension callouts mark symmetric 45 degree positions on the mounting hole pattern.
Square symbol and 130 dimension are shown on the bottom overall width dimension of the flange.

frontend_table_records.specification: Mounting holes located at 45 degrees from centerline on both sides

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 安装孔相对中心线两侧45度布置

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Square 130 flange with 4-Φ9 mounting holes on Φ145±0.2 pitch circle, angularly positioned at 45° on both sides.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not specified in this cropped front-view region.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Left connector is 6-pin motor connector; right connector is 17-pin encoder connector.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Shaft dimensions, depth dimensions, connector pinout details and tolerances other than Φ145±0.2 are not specified in this region.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标区域是电机技术参数表，包含'Rated Torque TN(N.m)'、'Rated Speed nN (rpm)'、'Maximum torque Tm (N.m)'、'Standstill torque Ts (N.m)'等转矩与转速性能参数；在给定类别中最接近电机性能曲线/性能参数类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内为带坐标轴和工作区间的电机转矩-转速曲线，纵轴为'T (N.m)'，横轴为'n (rpm)'，标有'Intermittent'、'Continous'、'9.55'和'4'等扭矩及连续/间歇工作区域信息。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR merged adjacent vertical axis tick labels; corrected from '24206' to visible tick values 24 and 20. The trailing character is ambiguous and not used as 16 because 16 has a separate reliable OCR source.
Visible drawing label appears misspelled as 'Continous'; engineering meaning is continuous.

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Units are explicitly shown on axes where OCR is available

terminology_notes: The drawing is a torque-speed curve rather than a mechanical dimension view.
Visible label 'Continous' is preserved as drawn; engineering interpretation is 'Continuous'.

dimension_records.reason: This is the vertical axis title of the torque-speed curve, not a mechanical dimension.
These are chart axis tick labels. The 24 and 20 values are merged in one OCR source, so confidence is medium.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框在完整图纸右下标题栏内，内容为'FINAL TOLERANCE REFERENCE'、'GB/T 1804-m'、'Unit:mm'和线性尺寸范围对应公差，如'≤6 ±0.1'、'>6~30 ±0.2'，属于机械图样的一般尺寸公差说明。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
